best_prompt: Identify the correct referent of the pronoun in the given sentence. You will be presented with a sentence and a list of possible entities. Use your understanding of grammar, context, and coreference to select the most likely antecedent. Provide your answer as a single letter choice, e.g., (B).

features.name: redundant_output_instructions
features.description: Measures whether the prompt contains redundant or repeated instructions about the output format (e.g., saying 'Provide your answer as a single letter choice, e.g., (B)' more than once). 1 indicates the presence of redundancy, 0 indicates no redundancy. Redundant instructions may confuse the AI and reduce focus on the core task, thus negatively affecting performance.

features.name: explicit_coreference_guidance
features.description: Measures whether the prompt explicitly mentions 'coreference' or 'coreference resolution' as a guiding concept. 1 indicates the presence of such guidance, 0 indicates it is missing. Explicit mention of coreference helps the AI focus on the specific linguistic phenomenon being tested, thereby improving performance on coreference resolution tasks.

features.name: task_specific_role_definition
features.description: Measures whether the prompt explicitly defines the AI's role in relation to the specific task (e.g., 'You are a coreference resolver'). 1 indicates the presence of such a role definition, 0 indicates it is missing. A clear role definition helps the AI activate the correct reasoning mode, thereby improving performance on the task.

features.name: contextual_analysis_instruction
features.description: Measures whether the prompt explicitly instructs the AI to analyze the sentence's context or structure when resolving the pronoun. 1 indicates the presence of such an instruction, 0 indicates it is missing. Contextual analysis is critical for resolving ambiguous pronouns, and explicit instructions to consider context can improve the AI's accuracy on this task.
